items.how_used: 论文将标准SIR模型扩展为五个类别：Susceptible, Infected, Removed, Deceased, Contagious，并引入潜伏期（Infected）和传染期（Contagious）的区分。
items.source_excerpt: The first model utilized five difference equations--one for each of the defined categories--to assign each member of the population a certain category.

items.how_used: 论文通过调整参数（如接触概率β、死亡概率μ）观察模型输出变化，评估模型对参数变化的敏感度。
论文明确列出4条假设，包括病毒功能等同、移除/死亡者不传染、儿童与老人死亡概率相同、每周接触人数为3等。
items.source_excerpt: Below are the assumptions made in order to complete the model. 1. The virus in the case study problem is functionally equivalent to those of Ebola. 2. Those who are removed or deceased cannot infect healthy individuals. 3. The death probability of children (age < 14 years) is the same as the death probability of elderly (age > 65 years). 4. Exactly 3 people...

items.how_used: 论文通过比较模型输出与实际数据（如死亡率）来评价模型，并讨论模型在不同场景下的表现。
items.source_excerpt: Using these models, it was found that the disease ran its course over 6 weeks for both the first and second models. Both models resulted in the infection of the entire population of the island, though the survival rate of the second model was notably higher.

items.how_used: 论文使用折线图展示不同类别（易感、感染、传染、死亡、移除）随时间的变化趋势，并附有图标题和编号。
items.source_excerpt: Figure 1: A graph for original assumed values

items.how_used: 论文中的差分方程未明确编号，但变量索引表（Table 1）清晰定义了所有符号，便于公式引用。
论文结构完整，包含摘要、背景、假设、模型设计、结论、敏感性分析、建议等，体现了团队分工与协作。
